description_long: This is a lifelike model of a Rock Pigeon, featuring a plump, rounded body covered in smooth, bluish-gray feathers. The head is small and rounded, with a short, straight, and slightly pointed beak that is pale at the tip. The neck displays an iridescent green and purple sheen, typical of urban pigeons, while the wings and back are a uniform gray with subtle feather patterning. The legs and feet are slender and pinkish-red, ending in sharp claws. The tail is short and squared off, blending seamlessly with the body, and the eyes are round and yellow with a small black pupil.
description: A realistic Rock Pigeon with bluish-gray plumage, iridescent neck, pinkish-red legs, and a short, squared tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, iridescent neck, and pinkish-red legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded chest, symmetrical wings, and direct gaze.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with visible beak and tail details.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the broad back, wing outlines, and squared tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid gray with iridescent green and purple on the neck, subtle wing patterning
